title: PMMO Skills Screen Hotkey
description: Adds a hotkey that opens/closes PMMO Skill Screen.
body:
Adds a keybind that opens/closes [PMMO](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-mmo) skills screen. Default key is R.

- Code written by AI, no issues found
- Tested on pmmo-1.20.1-1.7.38 and pmmo-1.20.1-1.2.20
- Keybind can be changed in Minecraft Key Binds menu
- Mainy for people that use Inventorio and PMMO
